title: Tenant boundary precheck
go_no_go_summary: Claude rated the S03 engineering deliverable GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings. Three P3 notes were optional informational observations and explicitly deferred because the substantive guarantees are preserved by the canonical prechecker output, fail-closed boundary claims, S04 Matter trace deferral, and defense-in-depth guards.

findings.title: Validator permits extra non-canonical strings in hand-authored blocked claim refs
findings.summary: Claude noted that assertControlPlaneClaudeReviewTenantBoundaryPrecheckResult requires the specific canonical mismatch ref but does not forbid additional arbitrary trimmed strings in manually constructed deny results.
findings.resolution: Deferred as optional hardening. The executable precheck only emits canonical refs, the behavior is not reachable from precheckControlPlaneClaudeReviewTenantBoundary, and the pattern is consistent with already-approved sibling prechecks.

findings.title: Matter shape consistency remains deferred to S04
findings.summary: Claude noted that matter_id null with a non-null same-tenant matter_tenant_id is allowed by the upstream normalizer and S03 precheck.
findings.resolution: Deferred by design to RP00.P02.M04.S04 Matter trace precheck. S03 only decides cross-tenant tenant-boundary metadata and does not enforce Matter-shape completeness.

findings.title: Redundant precheck guards
findings.summary: Claude noted that entrypoint, normalization marker, model, effort, and read-only checks repeat guarantees already enforced by assertNormalizedControlPlaneClaudeReviewRequest.
findings.resolution: Deferred as harmless defense-in-depth on a security boundary. No code change required.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --add-dir /tmp --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --no-session-persistence --tools Read --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit,Grep,Glob --output-format json

findings.title: Extra hand-authored blocked refs
findings.summary: Validator requires canonical mismatch refs but permits additional trimmed strings in hand-authored deny results; executable precheck emits only canonical refs.

findings.title: Matter shape consistency deferred
findings.summary: Null matter_id with same-tenant matter_tenant_id is not a cross-tenant condition and is intentionally left for S04 Matter trace precheck.

findings.title: Redundant precheck guards
findings.summary: Repeated entrypoint/model/read-only guards are harmless defense-in-depth.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M04.S04 Matter trace precheck as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed S03 consumes the S02 normalized Claude review request.
Claude confirmed S01, S02, and RP00.P02.M03.S20 dependencies are preserved.
Claude confirmed same-tenant actor, resource, and Matter metadata allow and tenant mismatches deny with canonical blocked refs.
Claude confirmed no runtime Claude invocation, no review queue writes, no audit writes, no service execution, no runtime route creation, and no product-state write.
Claude confirmed the M00 runtime contract remains untouched and RP00.P02.M04 stays open.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO and no P0/P1/P2 issues. P3 notes are optional hardening or explicit S04 deferrals.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and three P3 optional informational notes.
